allow: Bash(claude --yolo "Write a PRD.md file for the following task: Build a classifier for the Iris flower dataset. The classifier should use the standard Iris dataset from sklearn, split the data 80% training and 20% testing, train a classification model, display a Confusion Matrix, plot a loss curve over training iterations, and save all graphs as image files.")

Bash(claude "Read PRD.md and write a Python script called model.py that: 1\) Loads the Iris dataset from sklearn 2\) Splits data 80/20 train/test 3\) Trains an MLPClassifier 4\) Prints the Confusion Matrix 5\) Calculates Accuracy 6\) Saves confusion_matrix.png 7\) Saves loss_curve.png. Add clear comments throughout the code.")

Bash(claude "Write a REPORT.md file but the content must be in Hebrew. Include: 1\) Description of the Iris Dataset 2\) Description of the model used 3\) Confusion Matrix results showing 100% accuracy 4\) Explanation of the loss curve graph 5\) Conclusions. Reference the files confusion_matrix.png and loss_curve.png.")
